$schema_comment: Pinned GraphQLite version metadata. RFC-0007 §7 hard-pin (decision D11). Bumping requires re-running test/spikes/probe-merge-syntax.ts to verify the documented v0.4.4 quirks are still worked-around correctly. Do not edit `version` without coordinated changes in src/graph/sdk.ts and a fresh spike run. PR-4b will populate `checksums` for the lazy postinstall download.
